articles.title: Exxon and Chevron defy Trump pressure to boost oil production
articles.body: US supermajors stick to prewar strategies despite White House plea for more drilling to curb soaring petrol prices

articles.title: Trump says he will raise tariff on EU vehicles to 25%
articles.body: Levies on cars and trucks exported to US will be imposed ‘next week’ unless companies manufacture at American plants

articles.body: Unexpected increase in April supported by relative strength in household finances

articles.title: Trump's new executive order, with help from Congress, could increase U.S. retirement wealth up to 77%, researchers find
articles.body: Trump's executive order created a new way for Americans to save for retirement and called on Congress to expand the parameters of the deal.
